product_brief: An exactly once delivery messaging solution with enterprise-wide security and cloud-native resiliency.
pqc_capability_description: The document mentions "advanced messaging security," "end-to-end encryption," and "integrity checks" but does not explicitly state support for Post-Quantum Cryptography (PQC) algorithms or hybrid modes.
primary_platforms: Public and private clouds, containers, virtual machines, appliances, mainframes
target_industries: Banking and finance, Government and federal, Travel and transportation, Automotive and manufacturing
